concepts.headline: Skip the gridlock. Own the city.
concepts.subline: Lightweight frame. Unlimited range. No parking required.
concepts.rationale: High-contrast color block grabs foot traffic; appeals to young professionals wanting to bypass Mission traffic.

concepts.headline: Tu ciudad. Sin límites ni tráfico.
concepts.subline: Bicicleta eléctrica premium con desbloqueo inteligente y gran autonomía.
concepts.rationale: Resonates with local creative culture and Spanish speakers looking for a seamless daily commute.
